ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the video */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the video */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the video was recorded or released */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset containing the video */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in seconds */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded to the system */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the video */,
  "content_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator who uploaded the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_content_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_creator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "captions" (
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caption */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the caption belongs to */,
  "sentence1" TEXT /* First sentence of the caption */,
  "sentence2" TEXT /* Second sentence of the caption */,
  "source1" TEXT /* Source of the first sentence */,
  "source2" TEXT /* Source of the second sentence */,
  "caption_text" TEXT /* Full text of the caption */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the caption in the video */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the caption in the video */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the caption */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the caption */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the caption */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the caption was created */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the caption */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the caption was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captions_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_captions_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caption being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who scored the caption */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the caption */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluator */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Score for the accuracy of the caption */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score for the relevance of the caption */,
  "clarity_score" REAL /* Score for the clarity of the caption */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_caption_id FOREIGN KEY ("caption_id") REFERENCES captions ("caption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator (e.g., evaluator, admin, content creator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the evaluator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the evaluator */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the evaluator joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluator last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)
